details.IncidentDetail: "[2] BOTH VEHS EXITING DAY CREEK - WILL 1023 AT ARCO GS HIGHLAND/ DAY CREEK FOR 1110"

"[13] RP IN TOYT ADV SHE DID NOT HIT THE OTHER VEH BUT ALSO 1023 W/ PTY IN NISS FOR UNIT [Shared]"

"[125] SBPD ADV THEY ARE IN PROCESS OF ADVISING THE VIC WHERE VEH IS AND WILL CALL BACK TO 1039 US "
"[121] SBPD ADV THIS VEH HAS BEEN ENTERED AS STOLEN AND CAN BE RECOVERED NOW [Shared]"
"[115] SBPD LL - UNITS TAKING SVR FOR SV OF TC - HYUN SON (9JEP073) - REQ CHP TO REMOVE F/ STORAGE SO THEY CAN ENTER AS STOLEN"
